phase-plan.purpose: Refine templates so each phase references PRD/GRD direction, asks “what can improve?”, and keeps the docs lean.
phase-plan.scope: Docs only—focus on `ROADMAP`, `TASK-REGISTRY`, `DECISIONS`, `STATE`, and the new XML components; ensure PRD/GRD links/keywords are present.

file.description: Roadmap entry referencing PLAN/SUMMARY template plus PRD/GRD links.
Task entries referencing keywords/commands from the templates.
Document the “improvement question” decision for UX/code.

task.description: Embed references to `docs-site/components/ui/card.tsx` and other UI primitives inside the template examples.
Update the task registry + decisions doc to cite these templates and note UX/performance questions.
Migrate root + phase planning markdown into XML (no mirror), update roadmap from references.

decision.summary: Each loop must include an “improvement” self-check (UX, performance, maintainability).
decision.impact: Keeps phases compact while constantly refactoring for better experience.
